title: Verify cumulative bit encoding is enforced in-circuit
description: The Delegation circuit header documents that bit 4 implies bits 2+3 and bit 3 implies bit 2, but the actual constraint enforcement must be verified. Write a Halo2 MockProver test suite that attempts to create valid witnesses violating cumulative encoding (e.g., bit 4 set without bit 3) and asserts they fail. Additionally, write a formal invariant proving that any satisfying witness for Delegation has delegateeScope where the cumulative property holds. This prevents a delegatee from receiving a 'financial unlimited' scope without the intermediate tiers. Deliver: 12+ negative test vectors and a property spec.
